understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by getting all selectable pieces to occupy all goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time so the engine reports WIN and the game progresses through all levels to completion.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used discrete step actions with a finite step budget; MOVE_* would shift the currently selected piece one tile unless blocked by walls/obstacles, while CLICK at a coordinate selected/teleported the active piece to that target position only if the destination was valid (otherwise it had no effect). Obstacles/walls prevented moving or clicking into certain tiles, and with multiple selectable pieces you needed to switch/position them so every '+' goal tile was covered simultaneously.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by getting all selectable pieces to occupy all goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time so the engine reports WIN and the game progresses through all levels to completion.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used discrete step actions with a finite step budget; MOVE_* would shift the currently selected piece one tile unless blocked by walls/obstacles, while CLICK at a coordinate selected/teleported the active piece to that target position only if the destination was valid (otherwise it had no effect). Obstacles/walls prevented moving or clicking into certain tiles, and with multiple selectable pieces you needed to switch/position them so every '+' goal tile was covered simultaneously.
